{{Infobox concept
| name = Jade stage
| introduced = Unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Jade stage]] is a level of [[sacred artist]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c2">''Unsouled'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Jade]] is a stage of advancement.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c3">''Unsouled'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Bloodline ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Jade stage]] is weaker than the [[Gold stage]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c8">''Bloodline'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|"I don’t think you understand how much stronger they are than the Jades than I’m not sure I understand."<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c8" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
[[Category:Terminology]]
